source_intake_record.raw_question_text: The length of the diameter of this spherical ball is equal to the height of the box in which it is placed. The box is a cube and has an edge length of 30 cm. How many cubic centimeters of the box are not occupied by the solid sphere? Express your answer in terms of $\pi$. <image1>
